about_name.description: Name of the 'About' section, where users can see information about the extension

about_changeLog.description: Link to the extension's list of changes per release

about_sourceCode.description: Link to the extension's source code and its license type (MIT)

about_support.description: Link to the extension's support site

contextMenu_corralTab.description: Label for context menu item that closes the clicked tab and adds it to the corral
contextMenu_corralTab.message: Lap bezárása és URL azonnali mentése

contextMenu_lockDomain.description: Label for context menu item that locks the domain of the clicked tab
contextMenu_lockDomain.message: Soha ne zárjon be semmit ezen a domainen

contextMenu_lockSpecificDomain.description: Label for context menu item that locks the domain of the clicked tab
contextMenu_lockSpecificDomain.message: Soha ne zárjon be semmit ezen a domainen: $domain$

contextMenu_lockTab.description: Label for context menu item that locks the clicked tab
contextMenu_lockTab.message: Soha ne zárja be ezt a lapot

options_option_theme_label.description: Label preceding button group for choosing the color theme

options_option_theme_dark.description: 'Dark' choice for color theme. Dark background, light font

options_option_theme_light.description: 'Light' choice for color theme. Light background, dark font

options_option_theme_system.description: 'System' choice for color theme. Uses the preferred color theme of user's OS.

options_option_autoLockException_label.description: Label preceding input for adding whitelist exception
options_option_autoLockException_label.message: Engedélyezze a hirdetett fülek automatikus bezárását az URL-ekkel, amelyek tartalmazzák:

options_option_autoLockException_add.description: Button label for adding a whitelist exception

options_option_autoLockException_example.description: Example describing how whitelist exceptions work
options_option_autoLockException_example.message: Example: "cnn.com/sports" would match the page "https://www.cnn.com/sports" and any URL containing "cnn.com/sports".

options_option_autoLockException_empty.description: Message shown when there are no whitelist exceptions
options_option_autoLockException_empty.message: Nincs még nem telel -kivétel. Használja a fenti űrlapot, hogy hozzáadjon.

tabLock_lockedReason_whitelisted.description: Label for a tab locked because it matches the whitelist

options_option_autoLock_example.description: Example describing how the whitelist works
options_option_autoLock_example.message: Example: "cnn" matches any URL containing "cnn". Prefix a pattern with "!" to exclude matching URLs, for example "!https://www.cnn.com/private*". Wildcards "*" are supported. See https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch for full pattern syntax.
